titleStmt.title: SII 22.89: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 89. (A.R. No. 89 of 1906) SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT, TIRUKKŌYILŪR TALUK, JAMBAI. JAMBUNĀTHA TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. ACHYUTADĒVA-MAHĀRĀYA—Śaka 1455 (A.D. 1534)

summary.p: The details of the date are given as Jaya, Chittirai 24, Saptami, Monday, Pushya. (A.D. 1534, April 20. The Śaka year was 1456). The inscription records the appointment of a certain Śeṇbagarāyappichchar as general supervisor for getting some specified services performed in the temple of Tāṉtōṉṟi-Āḷuḍaiyanāyanār by Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Bhōgaiyadēva-Mahārāja, the Sthānattār of the temple, the Ūravar and the Palapaṭṭaḍai-śīrmaiyār. He was provided with a house to reside, some land and a portion of the offered food from the temple daily.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . śrīmanmahāmaṇṭalecura Accutatevamahā Irāyar piṟutvi
irācciyam paṇṇiaruḷāniṉṟa cakāttam 1000 4 100 5 10 5 Itaṉ
mel cellāniṉṟa ceya varuṣam cittirai mātam 2 10 4 cattamiyum
comavāramum peṟṟa pūcattunāḷ caṇpaiyuṭaiyār
tiruttāṉtoṉṟi yāḷuṭaiyanayiṉār koyil
maṇṭapattil śrīmanmahāmaṇṭalecura pokaiyateva
mahāirāca Ayyaṉum tāṉattārum Ūravar palapaṭṭaṭai cirmaiyārumāka Uṭaiyār ceyampunātar tampirāṉār tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka ceṇpaka(ka)rāyapicca reṉṟu perumkuṭuttu Iṉṉayiṉār koyilukku cāmanāyakattaṉattukku kaṭṭaḷaiyiṭṭa māṉiyam pututteruvil campantaperumāḷ nayiṉār koyilukku
kiḻakku tiruvitiyil teṉciṟakil Aṟupataṭiyil maṉai Oṉṟum caṇpaiyil nañcaiyil mutal varicai paṟṟil paṇṭitaṉtarattil tiruviḷakkuppuṟattaic cera Aḷantu viṭṭa kuḻi 3 100 puñcaiyil kavi kallaṭiyil kollai [ kuḻi 7 100] koyilil nāḷtoṟum peṟuñ coṟu muṉṉāḻi paṇiyāram Oṉṟu pākku muṉṟu veṟṟilai muṉṟu Im
matikāri nāḷtoṟum peṟṟukkoṇṭu māṉiyamuḷḷatum cantirātittavaraiyum Aṉupavittukkoḷḷakkaṭavarākavum Ivar Iṉṉayiṉār koyilukku ceyyum Ūḻiyam tiruppaṇi Eṟppeṟpaṭṭa Ūḻiyattukkum tirunāḷ Ūḻiyam tirutter koṭi kuṭai tiruvitipantam tāḷviḷakku pallakku
Eḻuntaruḷa paṇṇukiṟa Ūḻiyam niṅkalāka maṟṟum Eṟpeṟpaṭṭa Ūḻiyat tuṟaiyuḷḷattukku koyilpaṇṭārattil peṟum Ilakkaip peṟṟukkoṇṭu tām Āḷiṭṭu Ūḻiyan taṭṭaiyamaṟap paṇṇakkaṭavarākavum Iṉṉayiṉār koyilukku vaiykkiṟa Eṭukkiṟa cūtāṉattukku kaiviḷakkum
Oṭṭuviḷakkum piṭittu Itukkurittāka kūṭaniṟkakaṭavarākavum tāṉattār Ūravar cuvantiraṅkaḷ peṟṟapiṉpu tammuṭaiya cuvantiramum peṟṟukkoḷḷak kaṭavārākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu ceṇpakarāyapiccaṟku kalveṭṭikkuṭuttamaikku śrīkoyil paṇṭārattār Om
Itukku Akitam paṇṇiṉavaṉ civatturoki kurutturoki Ākakkaṭavarkaḷākavum Itu pa
ṉmāyecura Ira[kṣai] Ivai nāṟpatteṇṇāyiranampi Eḻuttu Ivai Ālālacavuntiranampi Eḻuttu Ivai periyanāṭṭuveḷār Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 22.89 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
